---
title: "Blog"
description-meta: "Notas y escritos — próximamente."
page-navigation: true
toc: false
page-layout: full
format:
  html:
    title-block: false
---

```{=html}
<div class="blog-shell">
  <section class="blog-page-hero" data-lang="en">
    <div class="page-eyebrow">Blog</div>
    <h1 class="page-title" style="color:#ffffff; border-bottom:none; padding-bottom:0; margin-bottom:0.75rem;">Writing &amp; notes</h1>
    <p class="page-subtitle" style="color:rgba(255,255,255,0.68); max-width:560px;">
      Short essays, methods notes, and reflections—in preparation.
    </p>
  </section>

  <section class="blog-page-hero" data-lang="es" style="display:none;">
    <div class="page-eyebrow">Blog</div>
    <h1 class="page-title" style="color:#ffffff; border-bottom:none; padding-bottom:0; margin-bottom:0.75rem;">Escritos y notas</h1>
    <p class="page-subtitle" style="color:rgba(255,255,255,0.68); max-width:560px;">
      Ensayos breves, notas de métodos y reflexiones—en preparación.
    </p>
  </section>

  <section class="page-wrap blog-body" data-lang="en">
    <p class="blog-coming-soon">*Coming soon*</p>
  </section>

  <section class="page-wrap blog-body" data-lang="es" style="display:none;">
    <p class="blog-coming-soon">*Coming soon*</p>
  </section>
</div>
```
